name: ubik
title: Ubik
description: An AI resident engineer for your codebase. Whispers findings to your Telegram, proposes fixes with evidence, and ships them through a pluggable executor when you tap approve.

tools.name: ubik.research
tools.description: Run a research session on a topic — codebase, competitors, tech trends. Returns a structured report.

tools.name: ubik.audit_repo
tools.description: One-shot audit of a repository. Surfaces stale code, missing tests, inconsistent patterns, security smells.

tools.name: ubik.propose_fix
tools.description: Generate a structured improvement proposal: severity, evidence, plan, risk.

tools.name: ubik.notebook.search
tools.description: Semantic search across past research notebook entries (multi-project memory).

tools.name: ubik.notebook.recent
tools.description: Return the N most recent notebook entries with their summaries.

resources.description: A single archived research entry as markdown.
An active improvement proposal awaiting approval.

_note: This file is a placeholder served from GitHub Pages until Sprint 2 lands the Python MCP server (which will serve a live, runtime-generated card from /.well-known/mcp-server-card).
